claims.statement: Channel Tunnel length is at least 3× larger than Suez Canal length.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Channel Tunnel length: 50.45 km. Suez Canal length: 193 km.

claims.statement: Shanghai Maglev top speed is slower than Category 5 hurricane threshold.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Shanghai Maglev top speed: 431 km/h. Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h.

claims.statement: Suez Canal length is longer than Great Wall of China length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Suez Canal length: 193 km. Great Wall of China length: 21196 km.

claims.statement: There are more known chemical elements than bones in an adult human body.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 118 elements vs 206 bones.

viz.labelB: bones in an adult human body

claims.statement: Barcode first scanned happened after First iPhone released.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. Barcode first scanned: 1974. First iPhone released: 2007.
